body: This adds a test that we can set a `Field` with `ReactantState` architecture to a CPU array.
title: Test setting ReactantState Field to array

body: @avik-pal asked me "what's RankConnectivity". I was puzzled at first. Then I looked and I said, "oh, it's the neighboring ranks". So we are changing the name of this object to represent the thing that it is.
title: Better name than RankConnectivity

body: I think the necessity of this PR possibly implies that we should combine / coalesce the `Operations` and `AbstractOperations` modules. Which by the way have pretty similar names if you didn't notice.
title: Export operators for surface / horizontally-reduced derivatives

body:
Moves `NetCDFWriter` to an extension. This is a breaking change since scripts that use `NetCDFWriter` now need to be `using NCDatasets` prior to the `NetCDFWriter` call.

This should be merged only after https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/pull/4210 is merged, and tagged in the same release. (Note that at the moment this PR is set to merge to `tc/netcdfwriter`, because I'm using that branch as a base, but I'll change it after https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/pull/4210 is merged.)

cc @glwagner @ali-ramadhan
title: (0.96.0) Move `NetCDFWriter` to an extension
Add section in the docs for reduced operations
